details.effect: [fanfare] Select any number of Pixie followers in your EX area and transform them into Thorn Burst tokens. [act][engage]: Recover X play points. X equals the number of Thorn Burst tokens in your EX area.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. Ward. [fanfare] Return another card on your field to its owner's hand: Give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
Ward. On Evolve, return another card on your field to its owner's hand: Give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
[evolve][cost00]: Evolve this follower. Rush. [fanfare] Give this follower [attack]+X. X equals the number of cards you've played this turn, excluding this card.
On Evolve: Choose one of the following effects. (1) Give this follower Storm. (2) Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it X damage. X equals this follower's attack.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. [act][cost01], [engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.
[quick] Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field. Draw a card and then deal X damage to the selected enemy. X equals the number of cards in your hand.

Select an enemy follower on the field. Its controller puts it on the top or bottom of its owner's deck. Combo (5): Each opponent puts each follower from their field on the top or bottom of its owner's deck instead. (The controllers determine the placement. Tokens put into a player's deck are removed from the game.)
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve: Put 2 Fairy Wisp tokens into your EX area.
[fanfare] Give [attack]+1/[defense]+1 to each other Pixie follower on your field and in your EX area.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage. When this card is returned to hand from your field, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.
[act] Banish a Pixie follower in your EX area: Give your leader [defense]+3 and draw a card. This ability can be activated once per turn.
Ward. [fanfare] Combo (3): Select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it and summon a Fairy token on that follower's field.
Select a card on your field. Return it to its owner's hand and draw a card.
[act][cost01], [engage], put this card into its owner's cemetery: Give your leader [defense]+1. When this card leaves the field, draw a card.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage. Combo (3): Deal 3 damage instead.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. Whenever another follower is put onto your field, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.
Whenever another follower is put onto your field, select up to 2 enemy followers on the field and deal them 1 damage.
[fanfare] Summon a Fairy token. Put a Fairy token into your EX area.
Whenever another follower is put onto your field, give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
Whenever one of your Pixie followers attacks, select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.
Put 3 Fairy tokens into your EX area.
[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field. It cannot deal damage this turn.
[fanfare] Select a Pixie follower on your field and give it [attack]+1. [act][cost01], [engage]: Return this card to its owner's hand.
[evolve][cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Summon an Otohime's Bodyguard token.
On Evolve: Summon 3 Otohime's Bodyguard tokens. If your field becomes full from this effect, put any remaining tokens into your EX area.
Rush. Assail. Ward. [fanfare] Select an enemy leader. If there are at least 3 cards on their field, give this follower [attack]+2/[defense]+2 and Aura.
[evolve][cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and engage it.
On Evolve: Select an engaged enemy follower and destroy it.
Ward. [lastwords] Summon 2 Steelclad Knight tokens and give them Ward. You may engage any number of them.
Summon a Viking, Steelclad Knight, and Knight token.
[fanfare] Give each [swordcraft] follower on your field [attack]+1/[defense]+1. Whenever a [swordcraft] follower is put onto your field, give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
[evolve][cost02]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve: Search your deck for a follower with [evolve], reveal it, and add it to your hand.
[fanfare] Search your deck for a [swordcraft] follower, reveal it, and add it to your hand.
[fanfare] Give each other follower on your field [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and engage it. [act][engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field and engage it.
[fanfare] Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may put a follower that costs 1 play point from among them onto your field. Put the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order.
